mapper.sql: id, org_name, org_id, building_name, house_id, room_num, meter_name, meter_serial, meter_num, card_num, concentrator_code, install_site, standard_id, standard_name, standard_price, start_reading, current_reading, total_used, trade_times, total_money, total_recharge, current_balance, create_by, type, create_time, imei, device_id, install_type, dtu_num, dtu_type, chan_num, archive_id, meter_arc_code
mapper.insert:
insert into pr_import_heat (org_name, building_name, room_num, meter_name, meter_serial, meter_num, card_num, dtu_num, dtu_type, chan_num, concentrator_code, install_site, start_reading, current_reading, total_used, trade_times, total_money, total_recharge, current_balance, create_by, type, create_time, imei, install_type, device_id) values
(trim(#{item.orgName}), trim(#{item.buildingName}), trim(#{item.roomNum}), trim(#{item.meterName}), trim(#{item.meterSerial}), trim(#{item.meterNum}), trim(#{item.cardNum}), trim(#{item.dtuNum}), trim(#{item.dtuType}), trim(#{item.chanNum}), trim(#{item.concentratorCode}), trim(#{item.installSite}), trim(#{item.startReading}), trim(#{item.currentReading}), trim(#{item.totalUsed}), trim(#{item.tradeTimes}), trim(#{item.totalMoney}), trim(#{item.totalRecharge}), trim(#{item.currentBalance}), trim(#{item.createBy}), trim(#{item.type}), trim(#{item.createTime}), trim(#{item.imei}), trim(#{item.installType}), trim(#{item.deviceId}))
mapper.update: update pr_import_heat a left join pr_house b on a.room_num = b.room_num set a.house_id = b.id, a.org_id = b.org_id where a.type = '0' and a.create_by = #{create} and b.del_flag = '0' and a.room_num = b.room_num and a.building_name = b.building_name and a.org_name = b.org_name

update pr_import_heat a left join mt_meter_match b on 1=1 left join mt_heat_archive mha on b.archive_id = mha.id set a.meter_arc_code = mha.code, a.archive_id = mha.id where a.create_by = #{create} and a.type = '0' and b.meter_type = '03' and a.meter_name = mha.name

update pr_import_heat a left join pr_standard b on a.standard_name = b.name and a.standard_price = b.standard_price and a.org_id = b.org_id set a.standard_id = b.id where a.type = '0' and a.create_by = #{create} and a.org_id = b.org_id and a.standard_price = b.standard_price and length(a.standard_name) > 0
mapper.select: select from pr_import_heat where type = '0' and create_by = #{create} and (house_id is null or org_id is null) limit 500
select * from pr_import_heat where create_by = #{create} and type = '0' and (meter_num is null or meter_num = '') limit 500

select from pr_import_heat where type = '0' and create_by = #{create} and meter_num in ( select meter_num from ( select meter_num, count(1) as cc from pr_import_heat where type = '0' and create_by = #{create} group by meter_num having cc > 1 ) aa )
select from pr_import_heat where create_by = #{create} and type = '0' and archive_id is null limit 500
select from pr_import_heat where create_by = #{create} and type = '0' and standard_id is null and length(standard_name) > 0
select from pr_import_heat where create_by = #{create} and type = '0' and (total_recharge != '0' or total_money != '0' or current_balance != '0') and (total_money + current_balance) <> total_recharge
select *, count(1) as cc from pr_import_heat where create_by = #{create} and type = '0' group by house_id, meter_serial having (cc mod 2) <> 0 or meter_serial is null or meter_serial = ''
select * from pr_import_heat where create_by = #{create} and type = '0' and current_reading < start_reading limit 500
select a.* from pr_import_heat a left join pr_heat_hot_archive b on a.house_id = b.house_id where a.create_by = #{create} and a.type = '0' and a.house_id = b.house_id and b.is_changed = '0' limit 500

select a.* from pr_import_heat a left join pr_heat_hot_archive b on a.archive_id = b.archive_id and a.meter_num = b.meter_num where a.create_by = #{create} and a.type = '0' and a.archive_id = b.archive_id and a.meter_num = b.meter_num and b.is_changed = '0' limit 500
select count(1) from pr_import_heat where create_by = #{create} and type = '0'
select org_name, building_name, room_num from pr_house where org_id = #{orgId} and del_flag = '0' order by org_name, building_name, room_num
select distinct org_id from pr_import_heat where create_by = #{create} and type = '0' and org_id is not null and org_id != ''
mapper.insert: insert into pr_heat_hot_archive (id, org_id, house_id, archive_id, meter_arc_code, meter_arc_name, meter_num, card_num, imei_num, dtu_num, dtu_type, chan_num, device_id, meter_serial, concentrator_code, install_site, standard_id, standard_price, opened_time, create_by, create_time, start_reading, current_reading, total_used, trade_times, total_money, total_recharge, current_balance, install_type, is_steps) select CAST(CONV(SUBSTRING(REPLACE(UUID(), '-', ''), 18, 14), 16, 10) AS SIGNED), org_id, house_id, archive_id, meter_arc_code, meter_name, meter_num, card_num, imei, dtu_num, dtu_type, chan_num, device_id, meter_serial, concentrator_code, install_site, standard_id, standard_price, opened_time, create_by, create_time, start_reading, current_reading, current_reading - start_reading, trade_times, total_money, ifnull(total_recharge, 0), ifnull(current_balance, 0), install_type, '0' from pr_import_heat where create_by = #{create} and type = '0' and house_id is not null and archive_id is not null
mapper.delete: delete a from pr_heat_hot_archive a left join pr_house b on b.id = a.house_id and b.org_id in ( select distinct org_id from pr_import_heat where create_by = #{create} and type = '0' ) where a.org_id in ( select distinct org_id from pr_import_heat where create_by = #{create} and type = '0' ) and a.house_id is not null and b.id is null
